creator: tim@config.com
text:
My laptop is a IBM thinkpad r52. It has a Mobility Radeon X300. I load
radeon by loader.conf or by compiling in the kernel. 

The dri/drm seems to work fine until I log out. 

Logging out of a graphical interface causes the system to panic every
single time.

I know of at least one other person who is having this problem. It can be
seen at
http://unix.derkeiler.com/Mailing-Lists/FreeBSD/stable/2006-05/msg00634.html

I'll be more then happy to supply any further information anybody needs
to get this fixed. 

I should mention that this card has full hardware acceleration and
suspends and resumes just fine under several different linux :( distros.

Fix: 

Comment out dri/glx in the xorg.conf and the system does not crash,
though it has much reduced functuality.
How-To-Repeat: Enable dri in xorg.conf on a r300 mobility radeon card and logout out
of a graphical interface.
